rationale: All required elements are present and correct: the #7C5CFF ring with a contrasting white rounded-diamond and dot, a wide bold white NOVA wordmark with generous tracking, and the muted gray 'light the way' tagline, all on the dark background. The filmstrip shows the intended choreography — the mark assembles with a rotating inner shape settling upright, the wordmark and tagline fade/rise in around the 25% still, a long clean hold, then a fade at the end — though the final still at 100% retains a clearly visible dim lockup rather than a completed fade-out, and the hold tiles look fully static so the subtle float is not perceptible. Composition is centered and optically balanced with nothing clipped, and the typography and shape finishing read close to broadcast quality.
